info.name: Lasso Security Classify / Threat Detection API

items.docs: Submit an array of chat messages for real-time security classification. Returns violations_detected, per-deputy booleans, and structured findings with action levels (BLOCK, WARN, AUTO_MASKING) and severity.

info.name: Classify messages and return PII-masked content.

items.docs: Behaves like /classify but also returns a PII-masked copy of the input messages when masking is enabled and sensitive values are detected.
